communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

"



• 911 call recordings (if available)
• Squad & Body-Worn Camera Videos of any officers that first responded to the scene. Said footage can start when the officer
arrives on the scene and end once the suspect leaves, either by being arrested, fleeing, or leaving with a reprimand/ticket etc.
• Interrogation or interview recordings of the suspect
• Complete incident/offense reports

Incident Details:
Case Title: Man found nude at day care accused of decapitating grandmother, Marion deputies say

Suspect Name: Audreona Rodasha Walker
Victim Name(s): Marcus Leath
Incident Date: 8/21/2021
Location: Fort Pierce, St. Lucie County, Florida
Department / Agency: St. Lucie County Sheriff’s Office
Source Link: https://www.clickorlando.com/news/local/2021/05/06/man-found-nude-at-daycare-accused-of-decapitating-grandmother-marion-deputies-say/
Case Summary: Audreona Walker was arrested in connection with the robbery and murder of DJ Marcus Leath. During the incident, a group of masked men broke into Leath’s home, ordered him at gunpoint to give up money, and shot him twice. Walker is charged with accessory after the fact to first-degree murder and providing false reports to law enforcement. Three other suspects face first-degree murder and related charges.

The records provided should be unredacted. If any portion of the requested records is withheld or redacted, please provide the specific statutory exemption justifying each redaction.

If this request is denied in whole or in part, please provide written justification citing the applicable law. If fees are required, kindly inform me prior to processing.

Thank you for your time and attention to this matter.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

david yupa
